---
title: "Lucy Helen Muriel Soulsby"
---

## Lucy Helen Muriel Soulsby

**Dates:** (1856–1927)

### Description

headmistress, contributor to <i>MP</i> (1884)

### Biography

She was the daughter of Susan Soulsby and author of devotional and educational works, [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from Novr 12th  1885

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
